gradient.$description: Deep Ocean dark-mode gradient tokens — deep navy to cyan glow, evoking luminous ocean depths.

primary.$description: Primary gradient — navy to cyan glow. Used on primary buttons and hero elements.

accent.$description: Accent gradient — deep navy to light cyan.

surface.$description: Surface gradient — very subtle navy/cyan sheen. Color(0x281976D2) and Color(0x2800E5FF): alpha=0x28 (16% opacity).

surface-primary.$description: Surface gradient tinted with primary. Color(0x301976D2) and Color(0x300D47A1): alpha=0x30 (19% opacity).

surface-accent.$description: Surface gradient tinted with accent. Color(0x3000E5FF) and Color(0x3040C4FF): alpha=0x30 (19% opacity).
